description: Create a 5-slide pharmaceutical sales presentation for Rosuvastatin Calcium using the source files in ~/Documents/Presentations/. The presentation must include a Title slide ('Rosuvastatin Calcium', subtitle 'For the treatment of hyperlipidemia'), a Title & Content slide for 'Mechanism of Action' using text from fda_label_copy.txt, a Title Only/Blank slide for 'Clinical Efficacy' containing efficacy_chart.png, a Title & Content slide for 'Safety & Tolerability Profile' featuring a native 4x3 table with a bold header based on adverse_events.csv, and a Two-Content slide for 'Prescribing Information' with 'Dosing & Administration' and 'Contraindications' from fda_label_copy.txt. Save the completed presentation to ~/Documents/Presentations/cardio_detail_aid.pptx.
